question: How to cancel DNC
answer:
Check DNC_Flag before answering the question.
If DNC_Flag is "Non VIP" then inform the customer:
1. Go to 'Menu' and select 'Do Not Call Service'
2. Click on 'Deactivate'
3. Click on 'Continue'
. CTA Label: Deactivate DNC, Android CTA Link: bajajsuperapp://doNotCall, iOS CTA Link: bajajsuperapp://doNotCall, Web CTA link: https://www.bajajfinserv.in/3in1web/Dnc/dnc-landing

If DNC_Flag is "VIP" then:
Please click on 'Get Help'
. CTA Label: Get Help, Android CTA Link: bajajsuperapp://doNotCall/callgethelp, iOS CTA Link: bajajsuperapp://doNotCall/callgethelp, Web CTA link: https://www.bajajfinserv.in/3in1web/Dnc/get-help

question: I am not getting calls
answer:
Check DNC_Flag before answering the question. 
If DNC_Flag is "Non VIP" then inform the customer basis below information:
Please click on the 'Deactivate DNC' button below or follow the given steps if you wish to receive phone calls and SMS about our offerings:

1. Go to 'Menu' and select the 'Do Not Call Service' option
2. Click on 'Deactivate' to complete the DNC service deactivation
3. Click on 'Continue'

. CTA Label: Deactivate DNC, Android CTA Link:bajajsuperapp://doNotCall, iOS CTA Link:bajajsuperapp://doNotCall, Web CTA link: https://www.bajajfinserv.in/3in1web/Dnc/dnc-landing
